title: Single-user printer queue stuck

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] User cannot print to department printer
servicenow_seed.description: One caller's jobs stay pending. Other users can print to the same printer.

correct_steps: Remove and re-add printer if needed
rationale: Only one user affected means do not escalate as printer outage. Fix local queue/spooler first.

tool_clues.print_server: Printer online. Other jobs completing. One user's queue has stuck job.
